title: Trump's national prayer event is largely focused on one religion
shortDescription: Of the 15 faith leaders participating in the May 17 Rededicate 250 event, 14 are Christian.

title: Makers of US flags urge Trump to impose tariffs on Chinese imports
shortDescription: Makers of U.S. flags are among the advocates for raising tariffs on foreign imports to combat what they contend is unfair trade from overseas.

title: Questions swirl around White House Correspondents' dinner security
shortDescription: One week after a gunman tried to breach dinner and allegedly kill President Trump and others, key questions remain about various security agencies.

title: Ramaswamy’s personality, Trump’s revenge will shape OH, IN races
shortDescription: Ohio and Indiana primary voters hit the polls on May 5 and will test whether President Donald Trump's grip on the Republican Party is slipping.

title: Secret Service shot armed person near White House
shortDescription: An armed individual was shot by Secret Service on the National Mall, prompting Secret Service to put the White House briefly on lockdown.

title: Trump calls Iran conflict a 'mini war'
shortDescription: Trump labels the Iran conflict a "mini war" and defends U.S. military strength while questioning public support.

title: White House briefly locked down after officer shoots individual nearby
shortDescription: The White House briefly locked down after the shooting a few blocks away on the National Mall.

title: Trump calls for Hakeem Jeffries' impeachment. Can that happen?
shortDescription: Donald Trump said Republicans should impeach Hakeem Jeffries, but impeachment likely isn't possible for a House Minority leader.

title: Trump posts AI image of himself, Cabinet members in Reflecting Pool
shortDescription: President Donald Trump posted an artificially generated image of himself lounging in the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool with Cabinet members.

title: Will Georgia governor's race go to runoff? Polls show undecided voters
shortDescription: New polls in Georgia governor's race show Keisha Lance Bottoms leading for Democrats, but a large group of still undecided voters.

title: Modi's party set to gain big in Indian state elections
shortDescription: Losses in Bengal, Tamil Nadu are weakening the opposition alliance ahead of the 2029 election.

title: Trump's disapproval rating hits a record high in new poll
shortDescription: In the latest Washington Post-ABC News-Ipsos poll, Trump's disapproval rating reached its highest level across both terms. Here are the top issues.
